case_title: LEYDEN CUBILLO VS. MARIA CARMEN OCHOA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CUBILLO, LEYDEN AS TO DEFENDANT OCHOA, MARIA CARMEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUBILLO, LEYDEN AS TO DEFENDANT OCHOA, MARIA CARMEN

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUBILLO, LEYDEN
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-03-2015 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-03-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-03-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUBILLO, LEYDEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OCHOA, MARIA CARMEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
